finding_density: rho_app proportional to 1/zbox (pure cell-volume normalization): z3/z5/z10 LT = 4.36e12/2.72e12/1.46e12; foil vs thick-z5 = 4.6x at same force; force(LT vs FFT)=0.92x
finding_robust: survival ~2.0 and junctions ~5-8 are ~cell-independent (DDD_FFT adds a few junctions vs LineTension); line-length relaxation 0.59-0.69
verdict: Apparent density is a REPORTING CONVENTION set by cell policy (rho ~ line_length/volume ~ 1/zbox), NOT physics. Cell-robust observables are network survival, line-length relaxation, and junction count. A foil-network density must always be quoted with its cell convention.
